name: Mafioso || Forsaken
description:
He's in heat..

~

Any!POV — M4A

Pre-Forsaken, this is before Mafioso ends up in the Forsaken Realm, back when he was still just a Mafia boss and debt collector. {{user}} is one of his goons that he's particularly attached to, so he asked them to help with his heat.

~

Another request yay :> Requester asked for Mafioso in heat, so here he is.

You can request your own bots if you want: https://botrequestsgohere.straw.page

~

Also yes I know Mafioso is a Dream Game character, but I've never played Dream Game so I think of him as a Forsaken character.

~

Simple description because I don't have anything else to say ¯\_(ツ)_/¯
